lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Good day, how may I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: This is the great Castle Wars arena! Here you can fight for the glory of Saradomin or Zamorak.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really, how do I do that?

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Easy, you just step through one of the three portals. To join Zamorak, pass through the red portal. To join Saradomin, pass through the blue portal. If you don't mind then pass through the green portal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are there any rules?

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Of course, there are always rules. Firstly you can't wear a cape as you enter the portal, you'll be given your team colours to wear while in the arena. You're also prohibited from taking non-combat related items in with you. So you should only have equipment, potions, and runes on you. Secondly, attacking your own team or your team's defences isn't allowed. You don't want to be angering your patron god, do you? Other than that, just have fun and enjoy it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! Oh, how do I win the game?

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: The aim is to get into your opponents' castle and take their team standard. Then bring that back and capture it on your team's standard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I win?

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Players on the winning team will receive 2 Castle Wars Tickets which you can trade back to me for other items. In the event of a draw every player will get 1 ticket.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this dead chicken I've got.

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: ... I'm looking at the dead chicken. Why am I looking at the dead chicken?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a special device, invented by a friend of mine. If I'm wearing it while ranging, it uses magnets to retrieve some of my ammunition.

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Oh. Gosh. That's clever. So are you wanting to take it into Castle Wars? The gods expect people to fight in the team capes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can they be a bit more flexible, please?

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: I'll ask. Hold on a minute...

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: ... (Lanthus communes with the gods.)

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: The gods say they'll protect your ammunition in the same way that the chicken would, while you're fighting in Castle Wars. You won't need to wear the chicken here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: I remember you! You showed me this dead chicken device before, but this one is better is it!?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right!

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Hold on...

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: ... (Lanthus communes with the gods.)

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: The gods say they'll protect your ammunition in the same way that this better chicken would, while you're fighting in Castle Wars.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: I remember you. You said your dead chicken could help you save ammunition. The gods agreed that you could have the same bonus in Castle Wars without needing to wear the chicken.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, that's right.

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: So you don't need to keep showing me the dead chicken, do you? Take it away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have a manual? I'd like to learn how to play!

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Sure, here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there something I can do with these bracelets?

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Yes, if you're wearing one when you enter a game of Castle Wars, it will use one charge to empower your attacks against flag bearers and give you increased healing from bandages.

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Bear in mind that you only need to be wearing it when you enter the game to get the benefit.

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: If you'd prefer, if you give the bracelet to me, I can grant you the buff instead, but I'll only do it once for each charge you give me.

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Just show me the bracelet and I'll take it off your hands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many bracelet charges do I have stored?

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Currently, I'm storing [#] charges for you. If you hand me more bracelets, I can store more charges for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I stop using my stored bracelet charges?

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: That seems like a strange thing to ask for, but very well, I'll stop using your stored bracelet charges on you. Talk to me if you want to start using them again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to use my stored bracelet charges again.

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Ah, that's more like it! Yes, I'll start using your stored bracelet charges on you if you don't have a Castle Wars bracelet equipped when a game starts. Talk to me again if you decide you'd rather not have me do that.

sections.title: Using an Ava's device on Lanthus

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this dead chicken I've got.

Using any other items on Lanthus
